nanobot.description: Lightweight open-source personal AI agent with chat channels, memory, and MCP support.

QwenPaw.description: Personal AI assistant deployable locally or in the cloud, with multi-channel chat and extensible skills.

CorridorKey.description: Neural-network green and blue screen keyer that unmixes foreground color and produces a linear alpha channel.

GLM-OCR.description: Multimodal OCR model for complex document understanding, layout analysis, and structured recognition.

OBLITERATUS.description: Toolkit for analyzing and removing refusal directions from large language model weights via abliteration.

Vibe-Trading.description: Personal trading agent with FastAPI backend and React frontend that orchestrates trading skills and tools.

ClawTeam.description: CLI orchestrator that coordinates swarms of coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, others) over file or P2P transports.

rlm.description: Plug-and-play inference library for Recursive Language Models supporting multiple sandbox backends.

sqlit.description: Terminal UI for SQL databases supporting SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQLite, Turso, and others.

sentrysearch.description: Semantic video search library using Gemini Embedding 2 or Qwen3-VL.
